text.plain: Yellowish color for old computer graphics
Grand project begun by the London Philological Society, in brief
Its base unit is the kilogram
One way to leave a door
One of the matriarchs in Judaism
Coffeehouse chain that owns the domain coffee.com
Remove, as a page of a notebook
Brew that's often a little cloudy and fruity
Festivals often featuring jousting knights, for short
Either bronze animal in front of the Art Institute of Chicago
